allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/ai/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"I want a 5-day cultural trek"}')

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('FALLBACK:',r._fallback||'NONE'\); console.log\('REPLY:',r.reply?.slice\(0,160\)+'...'\); console.log\('REDIRECT:',r.redirectTo\); console.log\('SUGGESTED:',\(r.suggestedDestinations||[]\).map\(x=>x.name\).join\(', '\)||'\(none\)'\);}\)")
